ci_support_linux_64_python3.11.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
proj:
- '9.8'
python:
- 3.11.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
name: pyproj
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: 3.7.2

package:
  name: pyproj
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/p/pyproj/pyproj-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 39a0cf1ecc7e282d1d30f36594ebd55c9fae1fda8a2622cee5d100430628f88c
  patches:
    - 0001-update-tests-for-proj-9.7.patch
    - 0002-fix-tests-for-proj-9.8.patch
    - 0003-fix-more-tests-for-proj-9.8.patch
    - 0004-fix-yet-more-tests-for-proj-9.8.patch
    - 0005-fix-still-more-tests-for-proj-9.8.patch

build:
  number: 4
  skip: match(python, "<3.11")
  python:
    entry_points:
      - pyproj=pyproj.__main__:main

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cython
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - cython
    - proj
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python
    - proj
    - certifi

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - pyproj
      pip_check: true
  - files:
      source:
        - test
    requirements:
      run:
        - pytest
        - shapely
        - numpy
    script:
      - pyproj --verbose
      - if: unix
        then:
          - export "PROJ_NETWORK=ON"
          - export "PYPROJ_GLOBAL_CONTEXT=ON"
      - if: win
        then:
          - set "PROJ_NETWORK=ON"
          - set "PYPROJ_GLOBAL_CONTEXT=ON"
      - if: ppc64le
        then: projsync --file us_noaa_nadcon5_nad27_nad83_1986_conus.tif
      - python -m pytest -v -s

about:
  license: MIT
  license_file:
    - LICENSE
    - LICENSE_proj
  summary: Python interface to PROJ library
  homepage: https://github.com/pyproj4/pyproj

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - djhoese
    - mingwandroid
    - ocefpaf
    - snowman2
    - jorisvandenbossche
    - xylar
    - zklaus
